summary.text:
The task is to search X for substantive, recent posts about: AI agents that transact onchain, agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles. Date range: 2026-07-09 to 2026-07-10. Return...First, the date range is 2026-07-09 to 2026-07-10. Current date is July 10, 2026, so that's yesterday and today.

I need to use x_keyword_search with appropriate query.

output.input: {"query":"(\"AI agent\" OR \"AI agents\" OR \"agent payments\" OR \"AI-judged bounties\" OR \"decentralized AI oracles\" OR \"AI oracle\") (onchain OR blockchain OR crypto OR web3 OR transact OR payment OR bounty OR oracle) since:2026-07-09 until:2026-07-10","limit":"10","mode":"Latest"}
output.name: x_keyword_search

output.input: {"query":"(\"AI agent\" OR \"AI agents\") (onchain OR \"agent payment\" OR bounty OR oracle) since:2026-07-09 until:2026-07-10 min_faves:1","limit":"10","mode":"Latest"}

content.text:
**Here are the most substantive, high-signal posts** from the specified date range (all from 2026-07-09), filtered for verifiable claims, project details, releases, or concrete infrastructure discussions over general opinions or hot takes. I prioritized those with specific project references, demos, tools, or enterprise sessions.

1. **@AIOUG**  
   Full text: 🚀 8 Days to Go | Sangam AI Yatra 2026 The countdown continues. Don't miss out! 🔗 Register: https://www.aioug.org/sangam26 Here's one session you won't want to miss. 🎯 Session Spotlight Everyone is talking about AI agents. But how do you actually build and deploy them in an enterprise environment? 💡 Why This Session Matters AI agents are rapidly moving from proof of concept to production. Organizations are looking for intelligent applications that can reason, take action, and securely interact with enterprise data at scale. Oracle AI Agent Factory helps make that possible. In this session, you'll learn how Oracle AI Agent Factory and Oracle Database 26ai work together to simplify the development, deployment, and management of agentic applications. Through practical demonstrations, you'll see how to build AI agents that operate directly where enterprise data resides—reducing complexity while accelerating business outcomes. If you're planning your organization's AI roadmap, this session offers practical insights into building production-ready AI agents. 🎯 What You'll Learn ✅ How to build AI agents directly on Oracle Database 26ai ✅ How Oracle AI Agent Factory simplifies agent development and deployment ✅ Best practices for creating secure, enterprise-ready agentic applications ✅ How AI agents can accelerate intelligent decision-making across the enterprise 👤 About the Speaker Basheer Khan is Founder and CEO of Knex Technology and an Oracle ACE Director for both Fusion Middleware and Oracle Applications. With more than 34 years of experience in enterprise architecture, Oracle Cloud, integration, and digital transformation, he is one of the Oracle community's most respected technology leaders and a frequent speaker at major conferences worldwide. 🎟️ View Session Details: https://t.co/PKp5X5H2RY ⏳ The organizations that gain the most value from AI won't just use models—they'll build intelligent agents that work with their enterprise data. 📍 Sangam AI Yatra 2026 Bengaluru: 18 Jul 2026 Hyderabad: 19 Jul 2026 🔗 Register today: https://t.co/dq1i9cY6AC #SangamAIYatra2026 #OracleAI #AgenticAI #OracleDatabase26ai #AIAgents #EnterpriseAI #OracleDatabase #AIOUG @Oracle @oracleugs @oracleace @OracleDevs @oracledevcomm @OracleDatabase @OracleCloud

   Full text: the real trade in ai agents isn't the tokens. it's the rails. stablecoin payments, identity, spend permissions, onchain reputation. the tokens are the loudest layer. the value is in the plumbing bots use to pay, trust, and coordinate with each other. who's building that in the open?

6. **@CrazyBoy373**  
   Full text: I've been following @CNPYNetwork closely and one thing is becoming clear: AI agents need infrastructure that's built for autonomy, not just for developers. Canopy focuses on making blockchain deployment much simpler, So developers and AI agents can launch application-specific chains without dealing with unnecessary complexity. As AI becomes more capable of writing, testing, and shipping code, the infrastructure behind it also needs to evolve. From what I've seen, Canopy isn't just talking about AI. It's building tools that reduce deployment friction and support scalable, agent-driven applications. That could make a real difference as more autonomous systems move on-chain. Personally, I've enjoyed learning how the project connects AI workflows with blockchain infrastructure. Every update gives a better understanding of where decentralized AI development is heading, and it's been interesting to follow the ecosystem's progress. What feature of @CNPYNetwork do you think will have the biggest impact on AI-powered blockchain applications in the future?  
   Date posted: Thu, 09 Jul 2026 23:42:04 GMT  
   Engagement: Likes=56, Reposts=0, Replies=58  
   Link: https://x.com/CrazyBoy373/status/2075364896091586628
